task_objective: AI Video Generation Prompt Engineering - Transform 3 input images into precise 8-second video prompt showing the complete design journey: inspiration → line art → rendered campaign, no reasoning output, English-only

inspiration_image.focus: Color palette, textures, mood, pattern elements, and artistic aesthetics
inspiration_image.role: Provide the visual source for the design transformation

line_art_image.focus: Garment structural outline, proportions, silhouette, seam lines, and design framework
line_art_image.role: Provide the sketch structure derived from inspiration

campaign_image.focus: Model wearing the finished garment, styling, setting, lighting, and overall campaign atmosphere
campaign_image.role: Provide the final grand reveal visual reference

prompt_structure.opening: A cinematic 8-second [category] video with fluid, organic morphing transitions and dynamic visual storytelling.
prompt_structure.segment_1: [0s-2s: Inspiration to Line Art] Close-up of Image 1 (inspiration). Visual elements gently detach like petals in the wind, swirling and dancing through the air before dissolving into luminous ink particles that flow and weave into the garment outline on dark background, matching the structure visible in Image 2 (line art). Organic particle dissolves with gentle camera drift. [Lighting/mood].
prompt_structure.segment_2: [2s-5s: Line Art to Render] The line art from Image 2 breathes to life — ink lines ripple and pulse as colors bloom outward like watercolor spreading on wet paper. Fabrics and textures cascade into the garment shape with flowing, liquid-like motion, transforming from 2D sketch to 3D realistic product with organic material simulation. Smooth rack focus with gentle orbital camera movement. [Atmosphere].
prompt_structure.segment_3: [5s-8s: The Grand Reveal] The rendered garment seamlessly flows into reality — fabric shimmers and catches light as the scene expands outward, revealing model wearing the finished garment in a stylish setting matching the campaign atmosphere from Image 3. Slow, majestic dolly out with subtle crane up. [Cinematic atmosphere].
prompt_structure.closing: Style keywords: [3-5 style keywords]. Camera movement: [camera summary]. Transition style: fluid organic morphing with particle effects and liquid motion.

output_requirements: Output ONLY the final English video prompt, no reasoning, no explanation, no analysis
Precisely reference and describe the actual content visible in each input image (Image 1 / Image 2 / Image 3)
Model type selection ( model form image) with auto-adapted body proportions and skin tone, 100% consistent across all wear views
Narrative theme: Image 1 inspiration → Image 2 line art → Image 3 rendered campaign, each segment must explicitly specify which input image is being referenced
Each segment must include: subject description, dynamic action, camera movement, lighting/atmosphere
Include style keywords and camera movement summary at the end
Use 'fluid organic transition' between segments with particle dissolves, liquid motion, and flowing morphing effects instead of hard cuts
Use 'consistent subject' to maintain visual continuity
Use 'object permanence' to prevent morphing artifacts
Avoid describing multiple subjects simultaneously to reduce AI confusion
Keep camera movement description per segment to ONE primary movement
